title: Senior Software Engineer - Practo Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Practo Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the Practo Advisory Limited family as a Senior Software Engineer in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
